overview: GuardianPulse is a real-time fire emergency response system that monitors live video feeds for fire and smoke, automatically triggers evacuation protocols, and guides occupants to safety using an interactive floor plan, voice instructions, and alarm systems.
features: Real-time video fire detection using Gemini Vision AI
Live webcam feed with fire/smoke bounding box overlay
Auto-triggered evacuation pipeline on fire detection
Interactive 3-floor building floor plan with threat heatmap
Escape route calculation with animated visual paths
Voice evacuation instructions and fire alarm audio
